name: Kyogre (Primal)
description: The Sea Basin Pokémon. Through Primal Reversion and with nature's full power, it will take back its true form. It can summon storms that cause the sea levels to rise.

abilities.name: Primordial Sea
abilities.description: For as long as this Pokémon is engaged in combat, the weather is Heavy Rain and cannot be changed. Heavy Rain is the same as Rain, with the additional effect that Fire-type damage is nullified. If Desolate Land is also active, then the weather is simultaneously Extremely Harsh Sunlight and Heavy Rain.

forms.description: When Kyogre is holding a Blue Orb, it can revert to its Primal Form at will. When it does, its AC, STR, and WIS each increase by +3, and its ability becomes Primordial Sea. Kyogre reverts to its normal form upon fainting or at the end of combat.
